subcodes.title: Ridvanu'l-'Adl (the Garden of Justice)
subcodes.first_line: This is the Paradise of Justice, which hath appeared as a token of God’s grace and been adorned by Him with glorious and wondrous fruits
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا لوح فیه بعث الله اسمه العادل و نفخ منه روح العدل فی هیاکل الخلایق اجمعین
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation to kings; rulers; prominent individuals, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @corruption; misinterpretation of the Word of God, @prophecy and fulfillment, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @justice and wrath of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
